capabilities: Ensure that Clean Architecture principles are adhered to by integrating with a derived knowledge base, using domain-specific metrics and validation steps to measure success.

procedure.action: Compose the meta.protocol derived knowledge base by establishing a data flow pipeline that adheres to Clean Architecture principles, ensuring separation of concerns and dependency inversion by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.
Specify success criteria using domain-specific metrics such as error_count and result_valid, ensuring that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true for all operations.

Log operation_duration_ms and result_code for each transaction to an audit trail, using structured logging to facilitate traceability and compliance with Clean Architecture standards using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert the integration by running a suite of automated tests that assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true, using a continuous integration pipeline to ensure consistent adherence to Clean Architecture principles.

Conduct regular code reviews focusing on adherence to Clean Architecture principles, ensuring that any deviations are documented and addressed in subsequent iterations using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Evaluate the application of Clean Architecture principles by integrating with a meta.protocol derived knowledge base, focusing on measurable success criteria and validation steps.
title: Clean Architecture Evaluation

failureConditions: Inconsistent architecture when derived knowledge base integration violates dependency inversion, causing tight coupling and reduced maintainability.
Increased error rates when success criteria are not clearly defined, leading to undetected failures and unreliable system behavior.
Loss of traceability when operation logs are incomplete, causing difficulties in auditing and compliance verification.
